text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is Valentine's Day. However, for some
reason...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: We're gonna play tag, Trainer! You versus me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And you're it first!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Starting... now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our game of tag begins.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Think ya can catch me within the time limit? If
you can, I've got some special chocolate for you!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: If you can't, you gotta eat beans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not quite sure why I have to catch her to get
chocolate or why I have to eat beans if I don't.
Mysterious as the rules are, we start the game.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Well, Trainer?! Do you give up?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oooh, you've got guts!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume certainly have incredible stamina.
Tired and barely conscious, I reach out my hand.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Whoa there! Just where do you think you're
grabbing?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: My fingertips catch El Condor Pasa's mask and...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Agh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...pull it off. El Condor Pasa's face is beet red.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
D-don't look at me, please. Taking my mask off is
against the rules...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: B-because... I'm... I'm embarrassed, okay?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I've never given anyone chocolate before. I
thought it'd be more natural if you just caught me
and took them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So this was supposed to be natural... It seems
challenging me to a game of tag was her way of
hiding her embarrassment.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Even though it was just the edge of my mask, you
got me, so... You win.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: So... here's your chocolate. I made it myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After getting such a sweet handmade gift, I can't
help but open it and try some right awa—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Trainer?! Are you okay? Are you alive?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I thought I might've put too much jalapeño in it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
These chocolates could be considered the world's
strongest in their own way. This is a truly
exhilarating Valentine's Day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
These chocolates could be considered the world's
strongest in their own way. This is a truly
exhilarating Valentine's Day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And then...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Okay, Trainer! Next is the Valentine's date!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Let's go for a passionate night stroll in the park!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not in a particularly passionate mood, but a
walk might be good.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hey, have you seen anything out of the ordinary?
You never know if someone is going to try to
sneak out on Valentine's Day.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Catch anyone that tries to go out, all right? We
can't let even one person get by us.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It's Vice President Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
She's a tough one... like a viper! If she catches
you, she doesn't let go! She just squeezes and
squeezes!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Is this it for us?! Is this as far as we go?! Should we
give up on our date?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Going out at night without permission is strictly
forbidden, even when accompanied by a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove is a tough cookie as well. She's
unlikely to look the other way. Unless...
choice_data_list: Why don't we try giving her you-know-what?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, you mean that!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Air Groove! Happy Valentine's Daaay! ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I brought some nice nutritious chocolates for my
favorite overworked vice president!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh, El Condor Pasa. Don't mind if I do...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Guh! Wh-what is this?! It's so spicy!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You! Did you poison me?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Don't worryyy! The spiciness is addictive!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Now's our chance, Trainer. Let's flyyy!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... Bueno! That was hella fun!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Is your heart pounding too?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, getting out of a pinch like that together
was kinda special...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I feel like we've really gotten closer. Isn't this
called...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's called the suspension bridge effect.
Apparently, experiencing something frightening
together can bring two people closer.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Right, the suspended ceiling effect!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: If we do more exciting stuff, we'll get hella close!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Would you... do a bunch of suspended ceilings
with me today?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Valentine's Day evening and the atmosphere
is unusually sweet...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mentally, El Condor Pasa's given me a constant
string of suspended ceilings.
